programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S1 - "The Future of Wearable Tech"
programme.desc: Join host Joe Penna as meets a colorblind man who, thanks to a revolutionary piece of technology, has become a well-known visual artist who ‘hears’ colors.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S1 - "Future Living Spaces"
programme.desc: Host Joe Penna goes on a voyage of discovery that takes him to underwater homes, and even homes built in tiny parking spots.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S1 - "The Future of Outer Space"
programme.desc: Join host Joe Penna as he talks to pioneers in the future of space.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S1 - "The Future of Driving"
programme.desc: Join host Joe Penna as he discovers where this invention is headed in the run-up to 2050.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S1 - "The Future of 3D Printing"
programme.desc: Join host Joe Penna as he meets pioneers in the field of 3D printing.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S1 - "The Future of The Oceans"
programme.desc: Join host Joe Penna as he visits with developers who are turning to the ocean as a renewable source of power.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S1 - "The Future of Entertainment"
programme.desc: Join host Joe Penna as he visits with people creating operas—with robots.

programme.title: Secrets of the Factories S1 - "Secrets of McVitie's Biscuits"
programme.desc: The McVitie's factory in Carlisle, Cumbria, opens its doors to reveal how millions of the nation's favourite biscuits are made, 24 hours a day, in one of Britain's biggest factories and oldest biscuit factory in the world.

programme.title: Disruptive Behaviour
programme.desc: Reuben Christian travels to Istanbul to meet the innovators who are changing the city and discover how technology is disrupting the old order.

programme.title: Bright Now S1 - "The Science of Cute"
programme.desc: Domestication shaped wolves into dogs and transformed both their behavior and their anatomy. New discoveries show how dogs produce a very specific eyebrow movement more often than wolves do.

programme.title: Bright Now S1 - "Predicting A Pro"
programme.desc: Increasingly high-tech tools are being used to evaluate youth baseball players. The question is can they outperform professional scouts?

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "An Assault Rifle, a Bomb Suit, a Mortar, and a Zodiac"
programme.sub-title: An Assault Rifle, a Bomb Suit, a Mortar, and a Zodiac
programme.desc: What starts off as a seven-pound bar of solid steel will soon deliver a bullet with deadly accuracy when it becomes the barrel of a Colt C7 assault rifle, and when plastic and bulletproof fabric are molded and stitched together,they’ll make a suit of armour made for the most dangerous job in the world.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "A Parajet, a Hovercraft, a Camo Jacket, and a Portable Military Shelter"
programme.sub-title: A Parajet, a Hovercraft, a Camo Jacket, and a Portable Military Shelter
programme.desc: As lightweight aluminum is cut and tooled, it will become the frame of a personal flying machine. Used by military operatives, drug enforcement agents, and first responders – it gets you in and out fast, whether you are carrying a camera or a gun.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "A Sniper Rifle, a Zeppelin, a Ka-Bar Knife, and Dragon Eggs"
programme.sub-title: A Sniper Rifle, a Zeppelin, a Ka-Bar Knife, and Dragon Eggs
programme.desc: In 48 hours, a block of metal will be formed into the most accurate weapon on earth: the AX-338 Sniper Rifle. In a warzone, police stand off, or hostage taking, the sniper is often the only solution to a bad situation.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "An Amphibious Armoured Vehicle, a Bomb Robot, and a Life Raft"
programme.sub-title: An Amphibious Armoured Vehicle, a Bomb Robot, and a Life Raft
programme.desc: When a steel plated hull is fitted with controls on the inside and tracks on the outside, it’ll become the Viking BVS10 –an armoured amphibious personnel carrier that can get troops in and out of any combat zone, even if it has to go through snow, sand, or water to get there.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "A Helmet, a Zippo, a Fuel Bladder, and a Simulated IED"
programme.sub-title: A Helmet, a Zippo, a Fuel Bladder, and a Simulated IED
programme.desc: When a series of delicate snowflake shaped sheets of Aramid are pressed together, they’ll form a piece of headgear that’s comfortable enough to wear to war, and tough enough to take a bullet.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "A Pistol, a Firetruck, a Ghillie Suit, and an Armored Fighting Vehicle"
programme.sub-title: A Pistol, a Firetruck, a Ghillie Suit, and an Armored Fighting Vehicle
programme.desc: At the Cabot factory in Pennsylvania, USA, a block of steel will be transformed by innovation and artistry into the ultimate update of an American classic. The 1911 did tours of duty in both world wars and Vietnam, and is still prized today by collectors and enthusiasts.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "A Cannon, a Parachute, a Medal, and a Stretcher"
programme.sub-title: A Cannon, a Parachute, a Medal, and a Stretcher
programme.desc: A battle tank is only as effective as its gun, and for the Stryker vehicle, that’s the M68 105mm cannon. A tube of forged steel will be hammered into the one of the most powerful and famous cannons in modern warfare.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "A Grenade Launcher, a Flight Simulator, and Ration Packs"
programme.sub-title: A Grenade Launcher, a Flight Simulator, and Ration Packs
programme.desc: The M203 Grenade Launcher is a single shot launcher designed to attach under a rifle barrel. Using the latest technology, bits of plastic and a block of aluminum will be melted, molded, and cut to create a snap-on weapon that increases the firepower in a soldier’s hands by a long shot.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "Jaws of Life, a Tank, and a Watch"
programme.sub-title: Jaws of Life, a Tank, and a Watch
programme.desc: A series of handcrafted, precision-cut pieces will come together to create a first response tool capable of chewing through metal like a can opener. At the scene of an accident, a natural disaster, or in the combat zone, the Jaws of Life can cut through just about anything .

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "An F16, a Sword, and Simulated Ammunition"
programme.sub-title: An F16, a Sword, and Simulated Ammunition
programme.desc: Brainpower and firepower transform 8,000 kilograms of computer-controlled machinery into a legendary dogfighter with the best fight and flight record in the sky; the Lockheed Martin F16.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "Camouflage Makeup, a Machine Gun, and an Amphibious Military ATV"
programme.sub-title: Camouflage Makeup, a Machine Gun, and an Amphibious Military ATV
programme.desc: Developed from solidified vegetable oil, this military grade compound is a long way from department store concealer: it’s sweat proof, infrared resistant, and stays on in the drenching downpour. For soldiers, especially Special Ops and snipers, camo paint completes their covert coverage.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "Combat Boots, a Pistol, a UAV, and a Riflescope"
programme.sub-title: Combat Boots, a Pistol, a UAV, and a Riflescope
programme.desc: For the soldier, the army boot is more than protective footwear. From the parade ground to the battlefield, the boot is a symbol of discipline and determination that marches the soldier right through his military career.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "A Rugged Case, a Precision Aerial Delivery System, a Military Survival Shelter, and an Armoured Personnel Carrier"
programme.sub-title: A Rugged Case, a Precision Aerial Delivery System, a Military Survival Shelter, and an Armoured Personnel Carrier
programme.desc: Polyethylene is measured and molded, heated and cooled to create a rugged and air-droppable case that’s tougher than the rest. Stronger, lighter, and more durable than their wooden predecessors, these keep out wind, rain, sand, and humidity to ensure that valuable supplies arrive intact.

programme.title: Battle Factory S1 - "Swiss Army Knife, a Sub-Machine Gun, Body Armour, and a Laser Sight"
programme.sub-title: Swiss Army Knife, a Sub-Machine Gun, Body Armour, and a Laser Sight
programme.desc: An iconic knife that’s been an integral part of military culture for more than a hundred years, the Swiss Army Knife has been put in service around the world – and even in space.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Fighter Pilots"
programme.desc: New pilots train in air‑to‑air combat at an international exercise, mastering dogfighting and modern fighter jet technology.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Paratroopers"
programme.desc: Airborne troops train as force multipliers, learning how paratroopers drop behind enemy lines to seize targets and launch ambushes.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Combat Medics"
programme.desc: Combat medics risk it all to save soldiers under fire. We join their training to see what it takes to save lives in the field.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Basic Training"
programme.desc: Basic training transforms civilians into soldiers, sailors, and airmen through intense physical and psychological tests.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Combat Fitness"
programme.desc: Combat fitness builds soldiers’ strength, endurance, and resilience, teaching skills crucial for survival, sometimes adapted for civilians.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Best Ranger Competition"
programme.desc: The US Army Ranger School hosts a 3-day competition to find the best Ranger team, testing elite soldiers in strength, skill, and endurance.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Infantry Fighting Vehicles"
programme.desc: Infantry Fighting Vehicles protect soldiers from bullets, shrapnel, and IEDs, showcasing modern armor technology and battlefield innovation.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "Human Performance"
programme.desc: How is it that some people have been able to reach the pinnacle of our human performance? Guided by Dr. David Behm, an expert in sports physiology, we uncover the fascinating intersection of science and athletic performance.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "The Blue Mind Part 1"
programme.desc: Why are we drawn to water? Is it just a nice view or is there more under the surface. We ask the question – does being close to or in water actually improve our health?

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "The Blue Mind Part 2"
programme.desc: Travel to Taranaki to learn about the innovative surf therapy program, Taupo to learn about the Maori connection with water and other fascinating take homes about our mental health.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "The Search for Mindfulness Part 1"
programme.desc: India’s ancient traditions have fostered a culture of spirituality which resonates through everything. We explore how India is able to find order in a fast paced world.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "The Search for Mindfulness Part 2"
programme.desc: Journey to the school of Happiness and learn about Karma in this second part of our India adventure. We travel from the Himalayas back to central Delhi with a new perspective on what mindfulness really means.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "The Pursuit of Happiness Part 1"
programme.desc: Bhutan embraces happiness above all else for its citizens. This approach has made Bhutan a model for health around the world. Is happiness the key to better health?

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "The Pursuit of Happiness Part 2"
programme.desc: Mike learns what happiness means to the people of Bhutan. He visits a school and a rural farm and learns how happiness is integrated into day-to-day life and leaves a note for his father at the famous Tigers Nest temple.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "Forest Bathing"
programme.desc: Learn how this deeply rooted Japanese tradition of forest bathing offers both physical and psychological benefits, opening your mind and tuning your senses to the therapeutic powers of nature.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "The Purpose of Life Part 1"
programme.desc: We learn about Ikigai and the reason for being that is so fundamental for life in Okinawa. We visit gardeners, play gate ball and meet an elder who is heralded for her wellness in the famous Miss Kitanakagusku contest.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "The Purpose of Life Part 2"
programme.desc: Have you ever hiked using your ears, nose and tongue? We learn about the ancient practice of Shin Rin Yoku or Forest Bathing on the outskirts of the worlds largest city.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "Planting a Seed"
programme.desc: With the guidance of a local soil scientist, follow Mike's hands-on journey into the art and science of farming sustainably.

programme.title: Health Explored S1 - "Pushing our Limits"
programme.desc: Uncover the multifaceted impact of stress on our well-being, and gain fascinating insights into how various stressors impact our physiological responses.

programme.title: The Ultimates S1 - "Ultimate Explosions"
programme.desc: Ultimate Explosions chronicles the compelling stories of explosions that have reverberated around the world.

programme.title: The Ultimates S1 - "Ultimate Racing Crashes"
programme.desc: Explore the high tech, high-speed world of car and bike racing.

programme.title: The Ultimates S1 - "Ultimate Trains"
programme.desc: A fascinating look at the radical concepts and innovative ideas that are making trains faster, safer and ever more futuristic.

programme.title: The Ultimates S1 - "Ultimate Strike Planes"
programme.desc: Take a look at the history of creating stronger, faster and more powerful military aircraft.
